user.title: Instant Jokes
user.description: Add a jokes sensor to Home Assistant, powered by bdihot.co.il. The sensor exposes the current joke and a queue of upcoming jokes as attributes.

refresh_jokes.name: Refresh Jokes
refresh_jokes.description: Fetches a new set of jokes from the API immediately.

next_joke.name: Next Joke
next_joke.description: Advances to the next joke in the queue.
